name: mindmaplib
description: Embeddable mindmap engine for web apps. Drop-in interactive mind maps in any portal or application.
author: Andrew Arto

scripts.check-boundaries: node scripts/check-package-boundaries.mjs && depcruise packages/core/src packages/core/tests packages/core/tsup.config.ts packages/react/src packages/react/tests packages/react/tsup.config.ts packages/react/vitest.config.ts demo/src demo/tests demo/functions demo/pages demo/worker.ts demo/apiLimits.ts demo/vite.config.ts demo/build-worker.mjs --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs
scripts.ci: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm check-boundaries
scripts.test:browser: pnpm --filter @mindmaplib/core build && pnpm --filter @mindmaplib/react build && playwright test
